description: A dimly lit tavern. The air is thick with smoke and the smell of spilled ale. Somewhere in the back, a bard is butchering a ballad about a dragon and a milkmaid.

items.name: Pale Ale
items.description: A pale blonde ale in a dented pewter mug. It's flat and lukewarm, but at least it's wet. The foam has long since given up the will to live.

items.name: Dog Meat Stew
items.description: A steaming plate of stew. The chunks of meat look questionable at best. The barkeep swears it's 'premium game meat.' You have doubts.

items.name: Rusty Key
items.description: A small rusty key. It looks like it might fit a padlock, or possibly a very tiny door for very tiny people.

items.name: Locked Chest
items.description: A sturdy wooden chest bound with iron bands. A heavy padlock keeps it firmly shut. The lock looks pickable... if you know what you're doing.

items.name: Tallow Candle
items.description: A half-melted tallow candle. It smells faintly of rendered fat and regret. Still, it gives off a warm glow.

items.name: Torn Map Fragment
items.description: A torn piece of parchment with faded ink markings. It appears to show part of a mountain range and an 'X' that might mark... something. Classic.

exits.description: The tavern door leads out to the village square.
